services.title: TV Mounting & Setup
services.description: Get that flat screen off the floor and onto the wall right. Cables hidden, level perfect.

services.title: Roof & Gutter Repair
services.description: Stop the drip before it becomes a flood. Shingles, gutters, and downspouts fixed fast.

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Toilet replacement, faucet fixes, and those annoying leaks that won't quit.

services.title: Home Maintenance
services.description: Door adjustments, cabinet repairs, weatherstripping — the stuff that makes home feel right.

about.heading: Tyler & the HoneyDo team
about.body: We're the Dothan handyman service that actually shows up when we say we will. One call handles your whole list.

reviews.name: Christine G.
reviews.text: Preston was amazing! Professional, kind, and knowledgeable. Tyler provided seamless TV mounting service.

reviews.name: DBMC A.
reviews.text: Tyler did an outstanding job on our roof repair! Professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. Quality work done in a timely manner.

reviews.name: Jennifer H.
reviews.text: Tyler was very nice and respectful and did a great job replacing our toilet. Definitely have more jobs for him!
